headline: AEP Texas Leadership Shift Links Grid Investment Plans And Ohio Nuclear Debate
summary: American Electric Power Company (NasdaqGS:AEP) has named Adrian Rodriguez president and chief operating officer of AEP Texas. The leadership change comes as AEP pursues major grid and infrastructure upgrades in its Texas service territory. At the same time, Ohio lawmakers are considering legislation that could permit electric utilities to own nuclear power plants. These developments are material for AEP given its regional footprint and role in meeting electricity demand. NasdaqGS:AEP is a...
